additional_metadata.note: Inaugural Bratislava dbt Meetup; presentations delivered in Slovak/Czech.

events.agenda: Inaugural Bratislava dbt Meetup covering an introduction to dbt, cultural adoption of data at Slido, and dbt's testing and monitoring capabilities.
events.event_description: dbt meetup bringing together the data community to learn from experts and expand their network.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Jun 22, 2023 · 5:45 PM to 10:00 PM CEST

The Spot, Bratislava

Bratislava dbt Meetup #1

Talk #1: "What on Earth is dbt?" - Radek Tomsej, Head of Data Engineering, Alma Career. An introduction to dbt and how it transforms a data analyst into a data developer.

Talk #2: "dbt: Unleashing the Data Fever" - Michal Kolacek, Head of Analytics Engineering, Slido. Real-life stories from Slido's data journey showing how dbt streamlined operations and empowered decision-making.

Talk #3: "How dbt helps you sleep at night" - Tomas Janotik, Senior Analytics Engineer, Infinite Lambda. Data quality testing and monitoring in dbt.

talks.description: An introduction to dbt and how it transforms a humble data analyst into a fully-fledged data developer.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: "What on Earth is dbt?" Radek Tomsej, Head of Data Engineering, Alma Career
talks.speaker_title: Head of Data Engineering, Alma Career
talks.title: What on Earth is dbt?

talks.description: Real-life stories from Slido's data journey illustrating how dbt streamlined operations, empowered everyone with data, and amplified decision-making.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: "dbt: Unleashing the Data Fever" Michal Kolacek, Head of Analytics Engineering, Slido
talks.title: dbt: Unleashing the Data Fever

talks.description: How dbt's testing capabilities help identify and address data quality issues early, and how dbt enables detailed documentation of models and tests.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: "How dbt helps you sleep at night" Tomas Janotik, Senior Analytics Engineer, Infinite Lambda
talks.title: How dbt helps you sleep at night

events.agenda: Second edition covering the modern data stack learning curve, a marketer's career transition into analytics engineering, and part two of dbt's data testing capabilities.
events.event_description: dbt meetup bringing together the data community to learn from experts and expand their network.
events.location: HubHub Twin City C, Mlynské nivy 16, Bratislava-Staré Mesto
events.raw_text:
Thu, Nov 23, 2023 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

HubHub Twin City C, Bratislava

Bratislava dbt Meetup #2

Talk #1: Modern Data Stack vs Modern Data People - Viktoria Horvath, Analytics Engineer @ Infinite Lambda. Common challenges people face starting their first dbt project.

Talk #2: Fighting the Fear of Change: My Shift from a Marketer to an Analytics Engineer - Alina Serhiienko, Analytics Engineer @ Slido.

Talk #3: How dbt Helps You Sleep at Night (Part 2) - Sean McIntyre, Senior Solutions Architect @ dbt Labs. Data testing techniques and strategies.

talks.description: The most common but unspoken challenges people face when starting their first dbt project or a new role in analytics.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Modern Data Stack vs Modern Data People. Viktoria Horvath, Analytics Engineer @ Infinite Lambda
talks.title: Modern Data Stack vs Modern Data People

talks.description: A personal story of transitioning from a marketing career into analytics engineering, and how modern tools like dbt make such career changes more accessible.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Fighting the Fear of Change: My Shift from a Marketer to an Analytics Engineer. Alina Serhiienko, Analytics Engineer @ Slido
talks.title: Fighting the Fear of Change: My Shift from a Marketer to an Analytics Engineer

talks.description: A continuation exploring data testing techniques and strategies, and how to leverage dbt's testing capabilities to ensure data quality.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: How dbt Helps You Sleep at Night (Part 2). Sean McIntyre, Senior Solutions Architect @ dbt Labs
talks.title: How dbt Helps You Sleep at Night (Part 2)

events.agenda: Third edition on boosting performance in the modern data stack, covering blue/green deployments, Slim CI for speeding up dbt development, and combining dbt with DuckDB for ML workloads.
events.event_description: dbt meetup bringing together the data community to learn from experts and expand their network.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Apr 25, 2024 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CEST

The Spot, Bratislava

Bratislava dbt Meetup #3

Talk #1: Blue/Green Deployments: How to Play and Win the Release Game - Milan Spal, Analytics Engineer at Infinite Lambda.

Talk #2: Leveraging dbt Tooling to Speed up Development and Deployment - Daniela Barokova, Analytics Engineer at Slido. Using dbt tooling and Slim CI to streamline deployment pipelines.

Talk #3: Level up the modern data stack with dbt and DuckDB kit - Jozef Regináč and Pavel Ježek at STRV. Running ML Python scripts inside the data stack using dbt and DuckDB.

talks.description: Applying a blue/green deployment strategy to increase application availability and reduce deployment risk by simplifying rollback if a deployment fails.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Blue/Green Deployments: How to Play and Win the Release Game. Milan Spal, Analytics Engineer at Infinite Lambda
talks.title: Blue/Green Deployments: How to Play and Win the Release Game

talks.description: Using dbt tooling and a Slim CI methodology to streamline data transformation and deployment pipelines, maximizing workflow efficiency and cost savings.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Leveraging dbt Tooling to Speed up Development and Deployment. Daniela Barokova, Analytics Engineer at Slido
talks.title: Leveraging dbt Tooling to Speed up Development and Deployment

talks.description: Combining dbt and DuckDB to run ML Python scripts inside a data stack, providing a simple, elegant, and cost-efficient solution.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Level up the modern data stack with dbt and DuckDB kit. Jozef Regináč (director of data science engineering) and Pavel Ježek (data engineer) at STRV
talks.speaker_title: Director of Data Science Engineering & Data Engineer, STRV
talks.title: Level up the modern data stack with dbt and DuckDB kit

additional_metadata.note: Coalesce watch party combined with live expert panel discussions.

events.agenda: Fourth edition combining a Coalesce watch party with live panel discussions on managing data incidents and semantic layers.
events.event_description: dbt meetup bringing together the data community to learn from experts and expand their network, featuring select talks from Coalesce plus live panel discussions.
events.location: HB Reavis Twin City C, Mlynské Nivy 12, Bratislava
events.raw_text:
Wed, Nov 20, 2024 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

HB Reavis Twin City C, Bratislava

Bratislava dbt Meetup #4

Topics:
Don't panic: What to do when your data breaks (video talk) + Managing data incidents (live panel discussion)
Semantic layers (video talk) + Semantic layers beyond the hype (live panel discussion)

Panelists: Daniela Karasova (Analytics Engineering Lead, Slido), Tomas Janotik (Cloud Data Architect, EMARK), Gergely Földi (Analytics Tech Lead, Infinite Lambda). Moderator: Mimi Křížková (Head of Data Analytics Engineering, Slido).

talks.description: Coalesce video talk on responding to data incidents, followed by a live expert panel discussion on managing data incidents in practice.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Don't panic: What to do when your data breaks (video talk) + Managing data incidents (live panel discussion)

events.agenda: Fifth edition covering career transitions into data, using AI to extract structured data from unstructured images with dbt, and migrating a dbt project between cloud data warehouses.
events.event_description: dbt meetup bringing together the data community to learn from experts and expand their network.
events.location: Apollo Business Center II, Block A, Prievozská 4, Bratislava
events.raw_text:
Wed, May 21, 2025 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CEST

Apollo Business Center II, Bratislava

Bratislava dbt Meetup #5

Talk #1: Project Adam: How to Get Your Data Career Started - Viktória Horváth, Analytics Engineer @ Infinite Lambda.

Talk #2: Taming Unstructured Data with AI - Tomáš Janotík, Cloud Data Architect at EMARK. Using an incremental dbt model with an LLM function to extract data from supermarket images.

Talk #3: Migrating a dbt Project Between Cloud Datastores - Tomas Sirny, Senior Data Architect at Slido. Migrating from AWS Athena to Redshift.

talks.description: A case study on transitioning into a data career, navigating the hiring process, and best practices for starting fresh in the data space.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Project Adam: How to Get Your Data Career Started. Viktória Horváth, Analytics Engineer @ Infinite Lambda
talks.title: Project Adam: How to Get Your Data Career Started

talks.description: Using an incremental dbt model that calls an LLM function to extract structured data (products, brands, prices) from supermarket shelf images uploaded to Snowflake.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Taming Unstructured Data with AI. Tomáš Janotík, Cloud Data Architect at EMARK
talks.title: Taming Unstructured Data with AI

talks.description: Slido's approach to migrating a dbt project from AWS Athena to Redshift, sharing best practices and pitfalls to avoid.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Migrating a dbt Project Between Cloud Datastores. Tomas Sirny, Senior Data Architect at Slido
talks.title: Migrating a dbt Project Between Cloud Datastores

events.agenda: Sixth edition covering enterprise-scale dbt e-commerce data architecture at Muziker and using dbt for data-driven personalization at Slido.
events.event_description: dbt meetup bringing together the data community to learn from experts and expand their network.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Nov 5, 2025 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

The Spot, Bratislava

Bratislava dbt Meetup #6

Talk #1: Enterprise dbt at Scale: Multi-Country E-Commerce Data Architecture with ClickHouse - Lukáš Kozelnický, Senior Data Engineer at Muziker. Production-grade dbt implementation powering Muziker's e-commerce platform across 30+ countries, handling multi-currency operations, 50+ data sources, and AI-powered inventory optimization.

Talk #2: What is Personalisation without Data? - Michaela Truchanová, Analytics Engineer at Slido. How Slido leverages dbt models to drive engaging, data-consistent client communication.

talks.description: Muziker's production-grade dbt implementation powering a multi-country e-commerce platform with complex multi-currency operations, 50+ integrated data sources, and AI-powered inventory optimization, compared to their setup 4 years ago.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Enterprise dbt at Scale: Multi-Country E-Commerce Data Architecture with ClickHouse. Lukáš Kozelnický, Senior Data Engineer at Muziker
talks.title: Enterprise dbt at Scale: Multi-Country E-Commerce Data Architecture with ClickHouse

talks.description: How Slido uses dbt models to power personalized client communication while ensuring data remains accurate and unified across systems.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: What is Personalisation without Data? Michaela Truchanová (Miši), Analytics Engineer at Slido
talks.title: What is Personalisation without Data?
